On the June 10 episode of “Show Champion,” the candidates for first place were aespa’s “LEMONADE,” tripleS’s “Baby Flower,” FIFTY FIFTY’s “Like a Bubble,” TREASURE’s “IF I,” and I.O.I’s “Suddenly.” tripleS ultimately took the win.
